zh.lifeSummary: 當Monica O’Hagen於1485年出生時，她的父親Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wiston42歲，母親Jane Bellingham33歲。她於1476年與Sir Richard Lyster結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1540年享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Monica O’Hagen于1485年出生时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wiston42岁，母亲Jane Bellingham33岁。她于1476年与Sir Richard Lyster结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1540年享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: O’Hagen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁgáin ‘descendant of Ágán’ ( see Hagan ).

variants.name: Hagan
meanings: Irish (Tyrone, Armagh, and Derry): shortened Anglicized form of O'Hagan , from Gaelic Ó hÁgáin ‘descendant of Ógán’, a personal name from a diminutive of óg ‘young’. Compare Hogan .

English: from the Middle English personal name Hagan, or Hagen, mostly representing Old Danish Haghni or Old Norse Hǫgni ‘protector, patron’, especially in Norfolk, where the name is well attested in the 12th- and early 13th-centuries. It may have been reinforced by Norman use of ancient Germanic Hagano, Hageno, Hagino, but there is no certain evidence for this in Anglo-Norman England. In Norfolk the name was confused with the Middle English personal name Hakun. It also developed to Hane and Hayne (see Hain ).

English: variant of Hacon with voicing of the intervocalic consonant, from the Middle English personal name Hacun (Old Norse Hákun, from ancient northern Germanic elements meaning ‘horse’ + ‘kindred’). Hacon is found mainly in Norfolk and Suffolk.

nameMeanings.name: Monica
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain ultimate origin. This was the name of the mother of St Augustine , as transmitted to us by her famous son. She was a citizen of Carthage, so her name may well be of Phoenician origin, but in the early Middle Ages it was taken to be a derivative of Latin monere ‘to warn, counsel’, since it was as a result of her guidance that her son was converted to Christianity.

en.lifeSummary: When Monica O’Hagen was born in 1485, her father, Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wiston, was 42 and her mother, Jane Bellingham, was 33. She married Sir Richard Lyster in 1476. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1540, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Monica O’Hagen est née en 1485, son père, Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wiston, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Jane Bellingham, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Lyster en 1476. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1540, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Monica O’Hagen 1485 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wiston 42 und ihre Mutter Jane Bellingham 33. Sie hat 1476 Sir Richard Lyster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1540 im Alter von 55 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Monica O’Hagen è nata il nel 1485, sua padre, Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wiston, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Jane Bellingham, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Lyster nel 1476. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1540, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Monica O’Hagenが1485年に生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wistonは42歳，母Jane Bellinghamは33歳であった。1476年にSir Richard Lysterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1540年に55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Monica O’Hagen(이)가 1485년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wiston(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Bellingham(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1476년 Sir Richard Lyster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1540년 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Monica O’Hagen nasceu em 1485, seu pai, Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wiston, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Jane Bellingham, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Lyster em 1476. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1540, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Monica O’Hagen родилась в 1485 г., её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wiston было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Bellingham, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Lyster в 1476 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1540 г. в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Monica O’Hagen nació en 1485, su papá, Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wiston, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Jane Bellingham, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Lyster en 1476. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1540, a la edad de 55 años.
